differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) invasive liver abscess syndrome
Infective endocarditis with systemic septic emboli
Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Cryptococcosis or Aspergillosis)
next_steps: Perform vitreous fluid aspiration for Gram stain, culture, and PCR
Perform transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to definitively rule out endocarditis
Obtain image-guided biopsy or aspiration of the hepatic mass
Send blood and sputum samples for specialized cultures including fungal and Nocardia
Consult Ophthalmology for emergent management of endophthalmitis
Consult Infectious Disease to optimize antibiotic/antifungal coverage based on preliminary culture results
Monitor for further neurologic decline or need for neurosurgical intervention for CNS lesions
